name: canva
description: Canva integration — create and edit designs, manage brand assets, search the library, and export via the official Canva MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Create and edit Canva designs, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Canva MCP to create and edit designs, pull brand assets, search the content library, and export — driven by the agent. Bundled with Canva's official skills for branded presentations, social-media resizing, and design translation.
